original_text: "Certifying agent" means an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations.
P: an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations
ig_script_full: E(certifying agent) F(means) P(an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations).
notes: Standard definitional constitutive statement. Named entity (Secretary) not decomposed per Named Entities Rule.

original_text: "Organic operation" means a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products.
P: a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products
ig_script_full: E(organic operation) F(means) P(a (farm [OR] handling operation) that (produces [OR] handles) organic agricultural products).
notes: Definitional constitutive statement. The [OR] operators are inclusive: an organic operation can be a farm or handling operation, and can produce or handle products.

original_text: "National Organic Standards Board" (NOSB) means the advisory board established to assist the Secretary.
P: the advisory board established to assist the Secretary
ig_script_full: E(National Organic Standards Board (NOSB)) F(means) P(the advisory board established to assist the Secretary).
notes: Named entity encoded as full E per Named Entities Rule. Secretary is a named/defined actor, not decomposed.

original_text: A producer of an organic operation must apply for certification with an accredited certifying agent annually.
Cex: with an accredited certifying agent | annually
ig_script_full: A,p(of an organic operation) A(producer) D(must) I(apply for) Bdir(certification) Cex(with an accredited certifying agent) Cex(annually).
notes: "with an accredited certifying agent" qualifies how the action is performed (procedural Cex). "annually" is a temporal Cex. No activation condition — rule applies at all times.

original_text: Certified organic farmers must not apply synthetic chemicals to crops at any time once organic certification is conferred, or else the certifying agent will revoke certification from the farmer.
O: A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)
ig_script_full: A,p(Certified) A(organic farmers) D(must not) I(apply) Bdir(synthetic chemicals) Bind(to crops) Cac(once organic certification is conferred) Cex(at any time), O{A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)}.
notes: "once organic certification is conferred" is Cac (event that activates the prohibition). "at any time" is Cex (temporal scope). "to crops" coded as Bind (indirect object — entity upon which the aim is directed via the direct object). Or-else encoded as vertical nesting.

original_text: Upon receiving a certification application, the certifying agent must inspect the applicant's operation within 60 days.
ig_script_full: Cac(Upon receiving a certification application) A(certifying agent) D(must) I(inspect) Bdir(applicant's operation) Cex(within 60 days).
notes: "Upon receiving a certification application" is Cac (event-triggered activation condition). "within 60 days" is Cex (temporal execution constraint).

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed: sign]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(sign) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cac(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from original sentence 2.4 (two aims: sign, file). S7a [AND] S7b. "following each site visit" is Cac (event-triggered condition).

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed: file]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(file) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cac(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from original sentence 2.4. Paired with S7a by [AND]. Same Cac and Bdir as S7a.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed: Certifiers]
ig_script_full: A(Certifiers) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from original sentence 2.5 (two Attributes: Certifiers, inspectors). S8a [AND] S8b. "every three years" is a temporal Cex.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed: inspectors]
ig_script_full: A(inspectors) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from original sentence 2.5. Paired with S8a by [AND].

original_text: When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act, a written notification of noncompliance shall be sent to the certifying agent.
Cac: When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act
ig_script_full: Cac(When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act) A([Program Manager]) D(shall) I(send) Bdir,p(written) Bdir(notification of noncompliance) Bind(certifying agent).
notes: Passive construction reconstructed to active form. Actor [Program Manager] inferred from context ("inspection by the Program Manager"). "written" coded as Bdir,p (property of the direct object). Cac is the event of noncompliance revelation.

original_text: Any operation that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic, except in accordance with the Act, shall be subject to a civil penalty.
A_prop: that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic
Cex: except in accordance with the Act
ig_script_full: A,p(that knowingly (sells [OR] labels) a product as organic) A(operation) D(shall) I(be subject to) Bdir(civil penalty) Cex(except in accordance with the Act).
notes: Actor property captures the qualifying clause. "sells or labels" rendered as [OR] (inclusive disjunction). "except in accordance with the Act" is Cex (procedural exception). The statement functions as a sanction rule; no explicit Or-else present.

original_text: A certifying agent whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section may at any time submit a request for reinstatement of its accreditation.
A_prop: whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section
Bdir: request for reinstatement of its accreditation
ig_script_full: A,p(whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section) A(certifying agent) D(may) I(submit) Bdir(request for reinstatement of its accreditation) Cex(at any time).
notes: Permission statement. Actor property clause qualifies eligible Attribute. "at any time" is Cex (temporal execution constraint). Could be component-level nested at IG Extended; encoded as A,p at IG Core.
